title: Industrial Engineer (West, 5 Days, $4.5k)
description:
Responsibilities:
• Review and optimize production processes, schedules and specifications.
• Implement process improvements to enhance efficiency and reduce costs.
• Develop production standards and control systems.
• Prepare cost estimates, material lists and production reports.
• Plan facility layouts and manpower requirements.
• Train staff on new processes and maintain documentation.

Requirements:
• Nitec/Diploma in Engineering related discipline
• At least years' of relevant industrial engineering experience
• Knowledge of precision machining and production management
• Able to interpret engineering drawings and assess manufacturability
• Familiar with production control and EHS practices

Please submit your resume in MS Word format to sunnie@united-personnel.com

Please remember to include your
1) Recent photo
2) Current salary & Expected salary
3) Notice period

UNITED PERSONNEL SERVICES
21 Bukit Batok Crescent
#02-75 WCEGA Tower
Singapore 658065
Tel: +65 65651939
www.united-personnel.com

EA Licence Number: 05C5278
Registration No.: R1103477

(All applications will be treated in strictest confidence. We regret that only shortlisted candidates would be notified)

postedCompany.description:
Based in Singapore, UNITED PERSONNEL SERVICES belongs to a new breed of companies that are built on the foundation of a different philosophy, a new way of thinking.

We are a team of professionals who, through a clear understanding of businesses, and access to a network of quality professionals, are committed to creating a whole new concept in what is broadly known as the recruitment business.

We aim to make a difference to our clients by providing high quality advice on human resource management issues and by proactively supplying them with the best available people. How we go about doing it is that we keep our ears to the ground, get into the thick of the action and get our hands dirty. We make it a point to understand our client's business and industry just as much as themselves.

With our extensive contacts in the region, namely in countries such as Malaysia, Thailand, Myanmar, Philippines, Indonesia & China, we give our clients an extra edge over competitors in terms of garnering timely and suitable talents especially in times of a tight labour market.

We specialise in the following areas:
• Oil & Gas, Petrochemical & Pharmaceutical Industries
• Engineering & Construction Industries
• IT & Technology Industries
• Semiconductor & Hi-tech Manufacturing Industries
• Logistics and Supply Chain Management Industries
• Brand Management & Graphic Packaging Industries

Contact us at:
21 Bukit Batok Crescent
#02-75 WCEGA Tower
Singapore 658065
Open from Mondays - Fridays from 9.30am - 6.30pm
Call us at: (65) 6562 2321 / (65) 6565 1939
